requirement_topic.en: Great Britain Market Access — UKCA and Accepted CE Marking
requirement_topic.zh: 大不列颠市场准入——UKCA 与可接受 CE 标志
requirement_topic.zht: 大不列顛市場准入——UKCA 與可接受 CE 標誌

summary.en: For many product sectors in Great Britain, UKCA marking is the UK conformity mark and CE marking continues to be accepted under UK government product-marking policy where the relevant rules allow it. A GaN charger entering Great Britain should map all applicable UK legislation, usually including the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016, Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016, UK RoHS and plug-safety rules. Northern Ireland follows different marking rules and may require CE/UKNI treatment depending on the conformity route.
summary.zh: 对于大不列颠许多产品领域，UKCA 是英国符合性标志；在相关规则允许时，英国政府产品标志政策继续接受 CE 标志。进入大不列颠的氮化镓充电器应映射所有适用英国法规，通常包括《2016年电气设备（安全）法规》、《2016年电磁兼容法规》、英国 RoHS 及插头安全规则。北爱尔兰适用不同标志规则，可能需根据符合性路径处理 CE/UKNI。
summary.zht: 對於大不列顛許多產品領域，UKCA 是英國符合性標誌；在相關規則允許時，英國政府產品標誌政策繼續接受 CE 標誌。進入大不列顛的氮化鎵充電器應映射所有適用英國法規，通常包括《2016年電氣設備（安全）法規》、《2016年電磁相容法規》、英國 RoHS 及插頭安全規則。北愛爾蘭適用不同標誌規則，可能需根據符合性路徑處理 CE/UKNI。

standards_or_laws: UKCA marking guidance for Great Britain
Great Britain acceptance of CE marking where applicable
The Plugs and Sockets, etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994

summary.en: China-market access is generally based on CCC, GB 4943.1 safety evidence, China EMC/material rules and China labelling. CCC is a third-party certification model for in-scope products, while Great Britain generally uses manufacturer conformity assessment and product marking with technical documentation.
summary.zh: 中国市场准入通常基于 CCC、GB 4943.1 安全证据、中国 EMC/材料规则及中国标签。CCC 对适用产品采用第三方认证模式，而大不列颠通常采用制造商符合性评估、产品标志和技术文件制度。
summary.zht: 中國市場准入通常基於 CCC、GB 4943.1 安全證據、中國 EMC/材料規則及中國標籤。CCC 對適用產品採用第三方認證模式，而大不列顛通常採用製造商符合性評估、產品標誌和技術文件制度。

gap.en: The market-access file must be rebuilt for Great Britain: applicable UK laws, declaration wording, importer or responsible economic-operator details, marking strategy, plug configuration and technical evidence all need UK review. CCC and China labels do not transfer automatically.
gap.zh: 进入大不列颠需要重建市场准入文件：适用英国法规、声明措辞、进口商或责任经济运营者信息、标志策略、插头配置及技术证据均需按英国要求复核。CCC 和中国标签不会自动转化。
gap.zht: 進入大不列顛需要重建市場准入文件：適用英國法規、聲明措辭、進口商或責任經濟運營者資訊、標誌策略、插頭配置及技術證據均需按英國要求覆核。CCC 和中國標籤不會自動轉化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligations come from applicable UK product legislation. UKCA or accepted CE marking is required according to the applicable GB marking rules; designated standards remain voluntary routes to presumption of conformity unless a separate law makes a specific technical requirement mandatory.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC and China-market labelling may apply for products sold in China, but they do not substitute for GB UKCA/accepted CE obligations.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Great Britain market access for a China-made GaN charger should be treated as a separate UK conformity project covering UKCA or accepted CE, electrical safety, EMC, UK RoHS and BS 1363 plug obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国制造氮化镓充电器进入大不列颠，应作为独立英国符合性项目处理，覆盖 UKCA 或可接受 CE、电气安全、EMC、英国 RoHS 及 BS 1363 插头义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國製造氮化鎵充電器進入大不列顛，應作為獨立英國符合性項目處理，覆蓋 UKCA 或可接受 CE、電氣安全、EMC、英國 RoHS 及 BS 1363 插頭義務。
